subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! We make mention of thee, that My remembrance may draw thee, that My call may bring thee nigh, that My utterance may strengthen thee, and that My loving-kindness may sustain thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد انا نذکرک لیجذبک ذکری و یقربک ندائی و یویدک بیانی و بمدک عنایتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @call to action
